meta.canonical_source: PCS's own branded deliverables in clients/pcs/Content Templates (14 print-format HTML, 16 PDF, 3 PPTX flyers) + PCS positioning audits + the Cypher Lab house writing-standards style guide. No Hivemind brand guide exists for PCS yet; this config is reverse-derived from shipped artifacts.
meta.note: PALETTE STANDARD (decided 2026-06-26 by Anup): the single go-forward brand palette is the SALES/MARKETING flyer palette (see colors._standard) — brighter, stat-driven, the system PCS uses when selling. The technical-documentation palette is demoted to colors._variants.documentation_system (docs only); the Moxi dark palette is an explicit sub-brand; the tissue-guide web palette is deprecated. The flyer source defined no neutral ramp or semantic status, so the ramp's border/surface steps are DERIVED and the status colours are CARRIED OVER from PCS's doc system (both tagged). Primary #0056B7 and the Franklin Gothic Medium / Merriweather pairing are verified across HTML + PPTX + the logo SVG. NOTE: the component, hero, and archetype specs below were captured from the DOCUMENTATION templates — when applying them to marketing pieces, recolour navy -> #002961 and use the teal/orange accents. No values invented; remaining unknowns are flagged in _gaps.

brand_proposition.positioning_mode: Mode I — Competitive (head-to-head vs gentleMACS + manual dissociation), per 00-triage-card.md, LOCKED 2026-06-15
brand_proposition.one_liner: The only automated tissue dissociation system that processes FFPE archival samples and reaches fresh or frozen tissue from 2 mg input, with an enzyme-free protocol and consistent output.
primary_alternatives: manual dissociation (mortar and pestle, enzymatic dissociation kits)
buyers: core and shared-resource facility directors (single-cell and flow cores)
single-cell atlas and genomics researchers (10x Chromium workflow owners)

key_differentiators.claim: Only fully automated FFPE-to-nuclei workflow on the market; gentleMACS cannot process FFPE at all.
key_differentiators._source: singulator-positioning-audit 2026-06-15: Aaron Goldman FFPE VOC ('I can't process FFPE in the Miltenyi machine ... It can't do it'); confirmed team crown jewel, Anup 5/19 positioning session

key_differentiators.claim: Roughly 10x lower fresh/frozen input minimum than gentleMACS: 2 mg vs ~20 mg.
key_differentiators._source: sources-and-candidates.md [verified: WebFetch + KB, 2026-06-15]; singulator-audit Anup 5/19 ('20 mg -> 2 mg ... an order of magnitude less')

key_differentiators.claim: Enzyme-free protocol with 96% cell viability (cells track only).
50+ tissue types across species, including plant and insect tissues where gentleMACS has no validated protocol.
key_differentiators._source: sources-and-candidates.md [verified 2026-06-15]; singulator-audit Kentucky VOC (plants, mosquito salivary glands, frog)

key_differentiators.claim: Cells or nuclei from one box; locked-modality competitors (e.g. Cytiva: cells only) cannot serve both.
key_differentiators._source: singulator-audit 2026-06-15 / 2026-06-02 marketing transcript ('Cytiva, you can only do cells')

key_differentiators.claim: Open-reagent platform: users supply their own reagents, vs Miltenyi's proprietary ~12-item consumable stack.
Throughput: nuclei ~7 min, cells 25-60 min; up to 16 samples/hour and 96/day with nuclei fixation and batching across instruments.
Honest throughput constraint owned: two samples per run, mitigated by nuclei fixation/storage for batching and by running multiple instruments under one operator.
key_differentiators._source: singulator-audit 2026-06-15: Yale and Kentucky VOC; team decision to own the constraint (Anup 5/19)

logo.mark_description: Circle containing a 3-bar histogram crossed by baseline + left vertical axis — reads as a cytometry / cell-count readout. Geometric, flat, no gradients.
logo.wordmark: 'Precision' / 'Cell Systems' stacked flush-left beside the mark; wordmark font Franklin Gothic Medium ~500 weight.
logo.lockup: horizontal only (mark left, wordmark right), ~4.2:1; no stacked variant found; full lockup used even at ~0.5in.
logo.clear_space: MISSING — no clear-space rule in any source. Ask PCS: what minimum clear space (in logo-heights or px) must surround the lockup? (tracked in _gaps)
logo.min_size: MISSING — no minimum reproduction size sourced. Ask PCS for the print + on-screen minimum. (tracked in _gaps)
donts: MISSING — no official logo misuse rules sourced; no black/monochrome variant found in any deliverable. Ask PCS whether a mono variant is sanctioned and what the don'ts are.

colors._standard: Sales/marketing palette (the PCS flyer system) — selected by Anup on 2026-06-26 as the single go-forward brand standard. The technical-documentation palette is demoted to colors._variants.documentation_system; Moxi dark is an explicit sub-brand; the tissue-guide web palette is deprecated.
colors._neutrals_note: ink / text_secondary / text_muted observed in the flyers; border + surface DERIVED to complete the ramp (the flyer source defined no neutral ramp).

status._note: Semantic status CARRIED OVER from PCS's existing documentation system (already in use across the technical docs) — not re-invented; the flyer source defined no status colors.

documentation_system._note: DEMOTED 2026-06-26 — technical/regulatory docs only, NOT the marketing standard.

moxi_subbrand._note: Moxi product-line sub-brand (dark editorial) — allowed for Moxi pieces, not the master brand.

web_outlier._note: DEPRECATED — migrate tissue_dissociation_guide.html to the standard.

color_strategy.primary_action: #0056B7 is the primary brand + action color (links, primary CTAs, key headings); #004AAC is its darker companion for footers, heading bars, and secondary/hover actions.
color_strategy.depth: #002961 navy anchors deep section backgrounds and dark text-on-color; white + #D9F1FD light tint carry the bright, open marketing feel (no dark page backgrounds in the master brand).
color_strategy.accents: Teal #20C997 marks positive stats and metric callouts; orange #FD7E14 is the attention accent; sky #00BAFF lifts icons and small highlights. Use accents sparingly — roughly one stat colour per view.
color_strategy.neutrals: Cool neutral text ramp: ink #000000 body, #555555 secondary, #777777 muted, #CCCCCC dividers, #F4F6F8 surface.
color_strategy.status_colors: Semantic status (info/success/warning/error) reuses PCS's established doc-system colours inside callouts only — never decorative.

typography.primary_font_family: 'Franklin Gothic Medium', 'Helvetica Neue', Helvetica, Arial, sans-serif
typography.body_family: 'Franklin Gothic Medium', 'Helvetica Neue', Helvetica, Arial, sans-serif
typography.role_split: Merriweather (serif) is reserved for DISPLAY/hero titles and section headings; Franklin Gothic Medium is the UI/heading sans; Franklin Gothic Book is the body weight in the flyers. (PPTX confirms Merriweather is display-only at 36pt, not paragraph body.)

eyebrow_label._note: observed in templates but eyebrow/kicker copy is hard-banned in voice_and_tone — treat as a label/doc-type tag, not editorial eyebrow

borders_radii._note: Flat/rectilinear system: radius 2-8px throughout; round forms only on step circles, accent bars, image frames.

cta_box.heading: Merriweather 13pt 700 #001A4D
cta_box._note: Print system has no interactive button; CTA box is a bordered panel with a URL link.

button_web_only._note: tissue_dissociation_guide.html web outlier only — not canonical

pattern_a_full_navy.use: brochures, quickstarts, user manuals, installation guides

presentation._source: Reverse-derived 2026-06-26 from the two finished PCS overview decks (SingulatorOverview_2026.pptx + MoxiOverview_2026.pptx). This is the DECK-specific design system — its own established look, distinct from the marketing-flyer palette that governs email/social/web. The bridge skill (skills/brand-pptx-template) renders to THIS profile. Both source decks ship on the default Office theme with the design hard-coded per shape; this profile captures that design so generated decks match.

rules.headlines: Merriweather bold, left-aligned, sentence case with a closing period. Navy #001A4D on light slides, white on navy slides.
rules.body: Franklin Gothic Book; slate #4A5568 on light, white or #C8D8EC on navy; ~11-13pt.
rules.accent: #00A3FF for stat numbers, title-slide subtitle, and small functional labels; green #26A74A for checks / positive; red #DC3445 for problem emphasis ONLY.
rules.chrome: Reversed logo top-left; page number bottom-right on light slides; thin left-edge accent bar on content/card slides; title-slide footer = presenter | date.
rules.devices: punchline bar (navy rule + centered navy tagline), stat cards (navy bg + #00A3FF numbers), product/comparison cards (header bar + bullets + BEST FOR), process flow (tint/navy step boxes + chevrons), recommendation/customer callout (tinted box + small colored label).

imagery._needs: image/video art-direction (style anchors, the 8-component prompt baseline, palette-as-mood, negative list, aspect defaults)
imagery._ask: PCS has no art-directed imagery system today — its deliverables use literal instrument product photos, flat brand-blue UI icons, and functional data figures only (no curated photographic/illustrative aesthetic, no abstract-biology art). Does PCS want a codified AI-imagery recipe (style anchors + negatives), or should the brand stay product-photo + data-figure only? If the former, supply 1-3 reference aesthetics and a 'never look like this' list.

voice_and_tone.headline_style: Direct, claim-led assertions with subject and verb front-loaded. Specific numbers or verified contrasts over generic benefit language ('2 mg in, viable cells out' and '50+ tissue types, one protocol' beat 'streamline your workflow'). Second person allowed on landing pages and email. No eyebrow/kicker text above any headline. No em-dashes in headlines. 'Not just X, but Y' is not a default structure (a single tight contrast is fine where the contrast is the whole point).
voice_and_tone.body_style: Default marketing register is practical: state the capability concretely (real workflow, real number), tie it to a felt consequence, give an action where the format calls for it. Use methods-section register (formal, impersonal, past tense for completed results) for datasheets and application notes. Active voice by default; passive OK when the subject is unknown/irrelevant. Present tense for capabilities/established facts, past tense for completed results. No first person in POV/thought-leadership unless a named byline is requested. 15-20 words/sentence in technical exposition; clauses under ~30 words. Oxford comma. SI units with a space (5 µL, 37 °C, 10 mM); no space before % or ° (95%, 90°). Numerals for measured quantities; spell out only at sentence start or restructure. Ranges with en-dash or 'to' (15-20 min, 10-50 mg). Match claim strength to evidence: 'demonstrates' (proven), 'suggests' (consistent-but-inconclusive), 'may/could' (untested); never strip a calibrated hedge.
hard_bans: no eyebrow or kicker text — any short label positioned above a headline is prohibited (standing agency rule)
em-dashes — replace with a period, comma, colon, or parentheses; restructure if needed

'not just X, but Y' and its family ('It is not X. It is Y.', 'X is not a Y, it is a Z', 'It is not about A, it is about B') as a default reframe move — a single tight contrast where the contrast is the whole point is allowed
formulaic rule-of-three (tricolon) as a habit — vary list lengths
manufactured specificity — invented atmospheric detail ('at 7 a.m. on a Tuesday')
naming concepts as a flourish — 'Call it the X', capitalizing a Named Concept for effect
stacked mechanical anaphora ('the same X, the same Y, the same Z'; 'Your A... Your B... Your C...') — break after two
self-reference / narrating the document ('in this article we will', 'this guide shows')
at the end of the day
PCS — 'clog-proof' / 'no clogging' (Moxi GO II: team rejected on record, 2026-04-22)
PCS — 'no xylene' / 'no fume hood' as a standalone Singulator differentiator (de-emphasize; 10x solved it too — Anup, 2026-04-07)
PCS — '81% less hands-on time' / '86% fewer pipetting steps' (Singulator stats retired; use samples-per-hour/day framing — Anup 5/19)
PCS — '2 mg' as the FFPE input minimum (FFPE is measured in 50 µm curls/sections, not mg; 2 mg is the fresh/frozen floor only — Nabiha 2026-06-02)
PCS — 'high viability' / '96% viability' applied to NUCLEI samples (nuclei lack membrane integrity by definition; viability is a cells-track claim only — Nabiha 2026-06-02)
PCS — naming Beth Israel or MD Anderson as a public reference account without explicit PCS sign-off (references being withdrawn / soft proof — singulator-audit 2026-06-15)
voice_and_tone._provenance: headline_style + body_style + house AI-isms + structural bans from pipeline-skills/writing-standards/scientific-writing-style-guide.md (v6, 2026-06-22), read in full. Agency 'no eyebrow' standing rule. PCS-specific bans from the Singulator (2026-06-15) and Moxi GO II (2026-06-16) positioning audits with source transcripts named inline.

_gaps: imagery — PCS has NO art-directed imagery recipe (product photos + flat icons + data figures only); set as missing-placeholder, not invented. Decision needed: codify an AI-imagery recipe, or stay product-photo + data-figure.
logo clear-space, minimum size, and misuse/don'ts rules are unknown — no brand guideline source; ask PCS.
logo monochrome/black variant — none found in any source; confirm whether one is sanctioned.

RESOLVED 2026-06-26 (Anup): palette standardized to the SALES/MARKETING flyer palette. Documentation palette demoted to docs-only (colors._variants.documentation_system), Moxi = explicit sub-brand, tissue-guide web palette deprecated. MIGRATION TODO: re-skin the 13 technical-doc templates + the tissue-guide web page to the standard over time (cosmetic, low urgency).

PPTX theme: the flyers ship on the DEFAULT Microsoft Office theme (brand colours hard-coded per shape). ADDRESSED 2026-06-26 by the pptx-from-brand-config bridge (skills/brand-pptx-template), which bakes the PCS palette + fonts into the .pptx theme. TODO: re-issue the 3 flyers from the bridge template so editors inherit brand theme colours.
Kersey 2026 nuclei-integrity benchmark (~100% vs ~85% vs ~35%) — in the written positioning but cited in 0 of 19 transcripts; confirm if still active before using as an opening claim.
Numeric MSKCC vs gentleMACS UMI comparison — not sourced; only a directional VOC exists. Do not publish a number without a figure.
Miltenyi gentleMACS published fresh-tissue input minimum — '~20 mg' is qualitative framing, not a datasheet number; verify before a numeric comparison.

Moxi GO II has no finalized brand_proposition (category decision 'cell counter' vs 'benchtop cell analyzer' unresolved) and its hero specs (<2% CV, NIST beads, 7 lb, FCS 3.1), CAR-T concordance, and NPI cell-health index definition/citation are unsourced — draft separately once PCS supplies them.
